description: Use this API to add or change harmonics voltage source table name in the working case. This API is used to add new table name with no harmonics data points or change table name from working case harmonics data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = har_vltsrc_name(name, namnew, intgar)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Harmonics voltage source table name whose name is to be changed. when name is provided, it must exist in working case harmonics data, then table name changed from name to namnew. if name is blank, a new table namnew will be added with no harmonics data points. (input; ‘’ by default).

parameters.name: namnew
parameters.description: New harmonics voltage source table name to be assigned. namnew must not exist in working case harmonics data. (input; no default allowed).

intgar.description: ANTYP, Harmonics Voltage Source angle type (1 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
